summary: Phase 45 testing complete - Order Detail & Tracking, +New Query button, and Standalone Factory features all working correctly. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for order detail page, My Queries tab, and Admin Brands standalone factory creation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 45 features fully tested: (1) Order Detail page at /account/orders/:orderId shows timeline, items, payment summary, shipping info. Pay now CTA visible for pending orders, Download invoice visible for paid orders. (2) My Queries tab has +New Query button that navigates to /rfq?from=account. RFQ submission redirects back to /account?tab=queries. (3) Admin Brands page allows standalone factory creation with '— Standalone (no parent brand) —' option in dropdown.

tests: Order cards clickable and route to /account/orders/<order.id>
Order number header displayed
Timeline strip with 5 stages (Payment, Paid, Processing, Shipped, Delivered)
Items list with fabric details
Payment summary with subtotal, GST, total
Shipping snapshot with customer info
Pay now CTA visible for payment_pending orders
Download invoice CTA visible for paid orders
Back to My Orders button works
+New Query button visible with data-testid='customer-queries-new-query-btn'
Click navigates to /rfq?from=account
/account?tab=queries opens with My Queries tab pre-selected
RFQ page sends Authorization header when lf_customer_token is set
POST /api/admin/brands with type='factory' AND empty parent_brand_id creates standalone factory
POST /api/admin/brands with type='factory' AND non-existent parent_brand_id returns 400
POST /api/admin/brands with type='factory' AND valid parent_brand_id works (regression)
POST /api/admin/brands with type='brand' ignores parent_brand_id (regression)
Admin UI shows '— Standalone (no parent brand) —' as default option
Factory list rows show 'Standalone' label when parent_brand_name is missing
GET /api/customer/orders/{order_id} returns order for owner
GET /api/customer/orders/{order_id} returns 404 for different customer
GET /api/customer/orders/{order_id} returns 401 without auth
GET /api/customer/orders/{order_id}/pay-context returns razorpay info for pending order
pay-context returns 400 'Order is already paid' for paid order
pay-context returns 404 for different customer
